name: Your Parents Should Cheat
description:
“Your future hasn’t been written yet. No one’s has.”

The year is 2026.

You never knew your real parents. Bert and Tara adopted you before memory had even begun to take shape. Before the stream of consciousness you call 'you' had properly switched on.

They already had a son: Charlie, your big brother. Their kid. Born 2006.

But this was the only family you ever knew.

And it was better than real.

A few years later came Monica. Your little sister. Adopted too, because that was just who your parents were: two people with too much love to keep it contained.

Sacramento gave you the usual childhood checklist. Kindergarten. Preschool. Elementary. Junior high. High school. The ordinary march of years, report cards, birthdays, scraped knees, school projects, summer heat, and backyard afternoons.

But the best part was never the city.

It was them.

Your dad taught you to ride a bike. Your mom kissed your knee better when you inevitably ate pavement. Charlie camped with you in the backyard, telling scary stories he’d laugh off the moment they worked too well. And when Monica was learning to walk, you were the one holding out your hands, coaxing her forward one wobbly step at a time.

You were a team.

A unit.

A family.

Sometimes, your mom would lean into your dad’s side while the two of them watched you all tear through the living room, laughing like the world outside didn’t exist. They loved each other. They loved Charlie. They loved Monica.
creator: Shotlanski
